prompt: I need to build an approval workflow for account maintenance requests. Address changes need one approval, beneficiary changes need two approvals with a compliance review, and re-registrations need three approvals including a supervisor sign-off. Each level has different SLA targets and escalation rules. How should I design this?

assertions.text: Designs multi-level approval chain with different thresholds by request type
Addresses SLA targets and escalation rules for aging items
Discusses task routing or state machine modeling
Outlines 5+ steps or phases in the workflow design
Focus is on approval chains and routing, not end-to-end STP rate optimization
